content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第1至第6题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions one to six.

content.cn_text: Woman：嗨，Greg，很高兴见到你。
content.en_text: Woman: Hi Greg, great to see you.

content.cn_text: 也谢谢你给我发邮件，告诉我你参加的骑马旅行的详细情况。
content.en_text: And thanks for emailing me with the details of the horseback riding trip you went on.

content.cn_text: 我看了网站，感觉很不错。
content.en_text: I looked at the website and it looks great.

content.cn_text: Greg：是的，我参加的是那个两天的小短假。
content.en_text: Greg: Yeah, I went on the two day mini-break.

content.cn_text: 你考虑的是这个吗？
content.en_text: Is that what you're thinking about?

content.cn_text: Woman：是的，就是这个。
content.en_text: Woman: Yes, that's the one.

content.cn_text: 你觉得他们现在7月还会有名额吗，还是已经满了？
content.en_text: Do you think they'd have places now in July or will it be full?

content.cn_text: Greg：如果可以的话，等到9月再去。
content.en_text: Greg: If you can, hang on till September.

content.cn_text: 我就是那时候去的，那真的是一个很适合去的时间。
content.en_text: That's when I went and it was a really great time to go.

content.cn_text: 首先天气没那么热。
content.en_text: It's not so hot for a start.

content.cn_text: Woman：那反正更适合我。
content.en_text: Woman: That'd suit me better anyway.

content.cn_text: Greg：还有一次我们停下来野餐的时候，我躺在田野里往上看，
content.en_text: Greg: And also at one point when we stopped for a picnic, I was lying in a field looking up

content.cn_text: 看到了一大群鸟。
content.en_text: and saw a huge flock of birds.

content.cn_text: 它们显然正在迁徙。
content.en_text: They were obviously migrating.

content.cn_text: 这也是那个时间去很好的另一个原因。
content.en_text: That's another reason why it's a good time to go.

content.cn_text: Woman：哦，太好了。
content.en_text: Woman: Oh great.

content.cn_text: Greg：哦，还有一件事，你们不是住酒店。
content.en_text: Greg: Oh and another thing, you don't stay in a hotel.

content.cn_text: 你们住在帐篷里，所以晚上不用回城里。
content.en_text: You stay in a tent so you don't have to come back to town in the evening.

content.cn_text: Woman：我愿意试试。
content.en_text: Woman: I'm up for that.

content.cn_text: 那第一天你们去哪儿？
content.en_text: So where do you go on the first day?

content.cn_text: Greg：会穿过一些很棒的林木山谷，里面满是栗树和山毛榉。
content.en_text: Greg: Through some amazing wooded valleys full of chestnut and beech trees.

content.cn_text: 但那只是上午，真正的目的地是山里，而且当你们出发时，
content.en_text: But that's just the morning where you're really heading for is the mountains and when

content.cn_text: 只能在远处看到那些山。
content.en_text: you set out you can only see them in the far distance.

content.cn_text: 实际上要到日落时才会到达那里。
content.en_text: You don't actually get there until sunset.

content.cn_text: Woman：骑一整天会不会很累？
content.en_text: Woman: Is it hard work riding all day?

content.cn_text: Greg：不会。
content.en_text: Greg: No.

content.cn_text: 节奏很轻松，中间安排了很多休息时间，可以野餐，甚至可以打个盹。
content.en_text: The pace is easy and there are plenty of breaks built in for picnics and even a snooze.

content.cn_text: 不过第一天晚上，在你骑了一整天之后，你会有机会
content.en_text: But on that first evening when you've been riding all day, you get the opportunity to

content.cn_text: 去游泳，你真的会很享受。
content.en_text: go for a swim and you really enjoy that.

content.cn_text: 非常放松。
content.en_text: So relaxing.

content.cn_text: Woman：那第二天有什么安排？
content.en_text: Woman: And what's on day two?

content.cn_text: 你之前是不是说过国家公园？
content.en_text: You said something about the National Park?

content.cn_text: Greg：不是。
content.en_text: Greg: No.

content.cn_text: 第二天，你们会沿着这个非常壮观的山谷往上走。
content.en_text: Day two, you go up this incredible valley.

content.cn_text: 在山谷尽头，有一个瀑布。
content.en_text: At the end of it, there's a waterfall.

content.cn_text: 那是一个非常适合停下来吃午餐的地方。
content.en_text: It's an amazing place to stop for lunch.

content.cn_text: 我们坐在那里时甚至还看到了一只鹰。
content.en_text: We even spotted an eagle while we were sitting there.

content.cn_text: 下午会有一段行程去一个洞穴。
content.en_text: And in the afternoon, there's a trip that goes to a cave.

content.cn_text: 你甚至可以骑马进去。
content.en_text: You can even ride into it.

content.cn_text: Woman：哇。
content.en_text: Woman: Wow.

content.cn_text: 听起来太棒了。
content.en_text: That sounds great.

content.cn_text: 我等不及了。
content.en_text: I can't wait.

content.cn_text: 在听对话的剩余部分之前，你有一些时间看题目
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions

content.cn_text: 第7至第10题。
现在请听，并回答第7至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 7 to 10.

content.cn_text: Woman：好的。
content.en_text: Woman: Okay.

content.cn_text: 那你对骑马周末旅行有什么建议？
content.en_text: So what are your tips for a horseback riding weekend?

content.cn_text: Greg：嗯，我去之前膝盖疼，所以我挺担心这个的。
content.en_text: Greg: Well, I'd had a sore knee before I went and I was pretty worried about that.

content.cn_text: 其实后来没事，但你真正要注意的是不要有
content.en_text: It was okay actually, but what you've got to watch for is that you don't have any trouble

content.cn_text: 背部问题。
content.en_text: with your back.

content.cn_text: 骑马会让背部问题变得更严重。
content.en_text: Riding can really aggravate that.

content.cn_text: Woman：这方面我没问题。
content.en_text: Woman: No problem there.

content.cn_text: 我猜还要穿舒服的衣服。
content.en_text: And comfortable clothes I guess.

content.cn_text: Greg：对。
content.en_text: Greg: Yeah.

content.cn_text: 但还有一件我之前没意识到的事，就是你其实要牵着马走下一些相当
content.en_text: But another thing I hadn't realized is that you actually walk the horses down some pretty

content.cn_text: 陡峭且不平的路。
content.en_text: steep and uneven paths.

content.cn_text: 所以一定要带徒步靴，而不只是普通骑马靴。
content.en_text: So make sure you have walking boots, not just normal riding boots.

content.cn_text: 即使你秋天去，也要确保别被晒伤。
content.en_text: And even if you're going in the autumn, make sure you don't get sunburned.

content.cn_text: 即使看起来多云，也要带防晒霜，多带一些。
content.en_text: Even if it looks cloudy, take sunscreen, lots of it.

content.cn_text: Woman：我觉得你已经说服我报名了。
content.en_text: Woman: I think you've convinced me to sign up.

content.cn_text: 我看网站的时候发现，如果我在线注册，就可以得到折扣。
content.en_text: When I was looking at the website, I saw that if I register online, I can get a discount.

content.cn_text: 你是这么做的，还是通过旅行社报名的？
content.en_text: Did you do that or go through a travel agency?

content.cn_text: Greg：我当然是网上注册的。
content.en_text: Greg: I registered online of course.

content.cn_text: Woman: 我只需要告诉老板我想什么时候请假。
content.en_text: Woman: I just have to let my boss know when I want to take time off.

content.cn_text: 然后我读到的另一个重要事项是，你必须确保你的保险
content.en_text: And then the other important thing I read was that you have to make sure that your insurance

content.cn_text: 公司知道你要参加一次探险旅行，以确保万一发生什么事，
content.en_text: company know that you're going on an adventure trip to make sure that you're covered in

content.cn_text: 你能获得保障。
content.en_text: case anything happens.

content.cn_text: Greg：我相信不会出事，但还是谨慎点更好。
content.en_text: Greg: I'm sure it won't, but better be safe than sorry.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of part one.

content.cn_text: 现在你有一分钟检查第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have one minute to check your answers to part one.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Might see large numbers of 1. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问可能会看到大量什么。原文说 saw a huge flock of birds，所以答案是 Birds。

items.title: Type of accommodation: a 2. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问住宿类型。原文先否定 hotel，然后说 stay in a tent，所以答案是 Tent。

items.title: Final destination: 3. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问第一天的最终目的地。原文说 where you're really heading for is the mountains，所以答案是 Mountains。

items.title: Evening activity: chance to have a 4. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问晚上活动。原文说 get the opportunity to go for a swim，所以答案是 Swim。

items.title: Explore the valley and have lunch by a 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问第二天在哪里旁边吃午餐。原文说 At the end of it, there's a waterfall，并说那里适合 stop for lunch，所以答案是 Waterfall。

items.title: Afternoon trip to a 6. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问下午去哪里。原文说 in the afternoon, there's a trip that goes to a cave，所以答案是 Cave。

items.title: unsuitable if you have 7. __________ problems
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问如果有什么问题就不适合这项假期。原文说 don't have any trouble with your back，因为骑马会加重背部问题，所以答案是 Back。

items.title: rocky paths so take 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问路很崎岖，所以要带什么。原文说 make sure you have walking boots，所以答案是 Walking boots。

items.title: Book online to get a 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问网上预订可以得到什么。原文说 if I register online, I can get a discount，所以答案是 Discount。

items.title: Inform your 10. __________ company about the type of holiday booked
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问要通知哪个公司你预订的假期类型。原文说 make sure that your insurance company know，所以答案是 Insurance。
